name: Thimira Kodithuwakku
raw_text: Thimira Kodithuwakku AI/ML Software Engineer thimirakodithuwakku14@gmail.com 0760113698 Colombo, Sri Lanka Linkedin GitHub PROFILE I am a Computer Science undergraduate specializing in Artificial Intelligence with a strong passion for software engineering, specifically in Web Development, Data Science, AI and Machine Learning. I am passionate about building innovative, data-driven solutions that blend creativity with technical precision, leveraging analytical thinking to bridge business needs and technical implementation. As an aspiring AI/ ML Engineer, I am dedicated to enhancing my skills in alignment with the goals of forward-thinking organizations. PROJECTS Cleverly 12/2024 11/2025 Social Media Platform for Consumer Reviews Developed a full-stack web-based platform with a MERN and FastAPI architecture, allowing users to post and analyze product reviews. Architected and deployed a multi-service fraud detection system combining rule- based heuristics with machine learning models (TF-IDF + Logistic Regression) to identify fake reviews and coordinated attacks. Engineered real-time sentiment analysis microservices using HuggingFace RoBERTa Transformers and FastAPI for instant text classification. Developed GenAI-based stance detection using Google Gemini and prompt engineering to classify user agreement via structured JSON. Processed text classification at scale using scikit-learn pipelines and joblib model persistence. Python, FastAPI, React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Scikit-learn, Transformers, Google Gemini ClaimSense 08/2025 Present Intelligent Insurance Claim Management System (Ongoing) Built a multi-agent AI system using Ollama (Llama 3.2-Vision Llama 3) to detect insurance fraud through image and text analysis. Developed a FastAPI backend with a dynamic state machine for automated routing of suspicious claims. Created a Streamlit explainability dashboard with agent decision timelines and visual evidence panels. Implemented AI agents specialized as Insurance Adjuster (vision) and Forensic Linguist (text). Python, FastAPI, Ollama, Streamlit, Llama 3 LedgerFlow 12/2025 Present High-Concurrency Transaction Processing Engine (Ongoing) Built a thread-safe financial backend ensuring strict ACID compliance.+3 Developed a modular architecture using SOLID principles and the Strategy Design Pattern to decouple calculation logic. Implemented an Optimistic Locking mechanism using JPA/ Hibernate to prevent race conditions. Created an Audit Logging Aspect using Spring AOP to record sensitive state changes. Java, Spring Boot, JPA, Hibernate, Spring AOP EDUCATION BSc (Hons) in Computer Science with Artificial Intelligence 2026 Present Coventry University, UK (delivered via NIBM) National Diploma in Technology (Information Technology) 2023 Present Institute of Technology, University of Moratuwa (ITUM) Physical Science 2007 2020 St. Anthonys College, Kandy Kandy, Sri Lanka SKILLS Technologies Tools Python, Java, JavaScript, FastAPI, Node.js, Express, React, Spring Boot, Scikit-learn, NLP, Transformers (HuggingFace), Generative AI (LLMs), Prompt Engineering, TF-IDF, Model Deployment, Feature Engineering, RAG, Docker, Git, Computer Vision, OpenCV, Ollama,Llama 3.2-Vision. SoftSkills Requirements Gathering, Stakeholder Interviews, Use Case User Story Development, UML Diagramming, Strategic Thinking, Business Analysis. Communication. LANGUAGES English Sinhala REFERENCES Mrs. D.A.S. Ruwanmini, Senior Lecturer at ITUM, Institute of Technology University of Moratuwa 077 855 8303 Mrs. Uthpala Athukorala, Head of IT Division at ITUM 077 266 6602
